# Nestelia

> A modular, decorator-driven framework built on top of [Elysia](https://elysiajs.com/) and [Bun](https://bun.sh/). Provides NestJS-style decorators, dependency injection, modules, and lifecycle hooks — without leaving Elysia's performance behind.

Nestelia brings structured, opinionated architecture to Bun-native development. Key features: `@Controller`, `@Injectable`, `@Module`, constructor-based DI (singleton/transient/request scopes), lifecycle hooks (`OnModuleInit`, `OnApplicationBootstrap`, `OnModuleDestroy`), guards, interceptors, pipes, middleware, WebSocket gateways, built-in HTTP exceptions, and GraphQL subscriptions.

## Getting Started

- [Introduction](https://nestelia.dev/introduction): Framework overview, motivation, packages list, and quick example
- [Installation](https://nestelia.dev/getting-started/installation): Install nestelia and its peer dependencies
- [Quick Start](https://nestelia.dev/getting-started/quick-start): Build your first CRUD app in 5 minutes

## Core Concepts

- [Modules](https://nestelia.dev/core-concepts/modules): How modules organize controllers, providers, and imports
- [Controllers](https://nestelia.dev/core-concepts/controllers): Routing with `@Controller`, `@Get`, `@Post`, etc.
- [Bootstrap](https://nestelia.dev/core-concepts/bootstrap): Application startup with `createElysiaApplication`

## Features

- [HTTP Decorators](https://nestelia.dev/features/http-decorators): `@Get`, `@Post`, `@Put`, `@Delete`, `@Patch`, `@Header`, `@HttpCode`
- [Parameter Decorators](https://nestelia.dev/features/parameter-decorators): `@Body`, `@Param`, `@Query`, `@Headers`, `@Req`, `@Res`, `@Ctx`
- [Dependency Injection](https://nestelia.dev/features/dependency-injection): Constructor-based DI with singleton, transient, and request scopes
- [Lifecycle Hooks](https://nestelia.dev/features/lifecycle-hooks): `OnModuleInit`, `OnApplicationBootstrap`, `OnModuleDestroy`, `BeforeApplicationShutdown`
- [Middleware](https://nestelia.dev/features/middleware): Class-based and functional middleware
- [Exception Handling](https://nestelia.dev/features/exception-handling): `HttpException`, `BadRequestException`, `NotFoundException`, custom filters
- [Guards](https://nestelia.dev/features/guards): `CanActivate` interface, `@UseGuards`, `ExecutionContext`
- [Interceptors](https://nestelia.dev/features/interceptors): `NestInterceptor`, `@UseInterceptors`, `CallHandler`, RxJS-based pipeline
- [Pipes](https://nestelia.dev/features/pipes): `PipeTransform`, `@UsePipes`, validation and transformation
- [WebSocket Gateways](https://nestelia.dev/features/websocket-gateways): `@WebSocketGateway`, `@OnOpen`, `@OnMessage`, `@OnClose`, real-time handlers

## Performance

- [Performance](https://nestelia.dev/performance): Benchmarks vs NestJS, Express, Fastify — near-zero overhead

## Packages

- [Packages Overview](https://nestelia.dev/packages/overview): All optional packages at a glance
- [Scheduler](https://nestelia.dev/packages/scheduler): Cron jobs (`@Cron`), intervals (`@Interval`), timeouts (`@Timeout`)
- [Microservices](https://nestelia.dev/packages/microservices): TCP, Redis, RabbitMQ transports; `@MessagePattern`, `@EventPattern`, `ClientProxy`
- [Apollo / GraphQL](https://nestelia.dev/packages/apollo): Code-first GraphQL with `@Resolver`, `@Query`, `@Mutation`, `@Subscription`, `@ObjectType`, `@Field`
- [Passport](https://nestelia.dev/packages/passport): Authentication via `PassportStrategy`, `AuthGuard`
- [Testing](https://nestelia.dev/packages/testing): `Test.createTestingModule()` with provider overrides
- [Cache](https://nestelia.dev/packages/cache): HTTP response caching with `@CacheKey`, `@CacheTTL`, `CacheInterceptor`
- [RabbitMQ](https://nestelia.dev/packages/rabbitmq): Advanced RabbitMQ with `@RabbitSubscribe`, `@RabbitRPC`, `AmqpConnection`
- [GraphQL PubSub](https://nestelia.dev/packages/graphql-pubsub): Redis-backed PubSub for GraphQL subscriptions
- [Drizzle ORM](https://nestelia.dev/packages/drizzle): `DrizzleModule`, `@InjectDrizzle` for Drizzle ORM integration
- [Event Emitter](https://nestelia.dev/packages/event-emitter): `@OnEvent`, `EventEmitterModule`, typed event payloads

## Advanced

- [Custom Providers](https://nestelia.dev/advanced/custom-providers): `useValue`, `useFactory`, `useClass`, `useExisting`
- [Forward References](https://nestelia.dev/advanced/forward-ref): Resolving circular dependencies with `forwardRef()`
- [Container API](https://nestelia.dev/advanced/container-api): Direct DI container access via `ModuleRef`
- [Swagger](https://nestelia.dev/advanced/swagger): Auto-generated OpenAPI docs via Elysia's Swagger plugin
- [Eden Treaty](https://nestelia.dev/advanced/eden-treaty): Type-safe HTTP client for nestelia using @elysiajs/eden

## API Reference

- [API Reference](https://nestelia.dev/api-reference/index/README): Full TypeDoc-generated API reference for all exports
